-: S E N D G R E E T I N G S:-

WHEREAS the said vendor is seized and possessed of all that divided and defined allotment of land marked lot 1 together with the right of way over lot 3 depicted in plan No.210 dated 2001.12.21 made by Ishara Mahanama, Licensed Surveyor under and by virtue of Deed No. 600 dated 09.3.2002 attested by the Notary attesting these presents which is morefully described in the schedule hereto. 

AND WHEREAS the said VENDOR has agreed with ANOMA PILAPITIYA (Holder of National Identity Card No. 637611505V) of No 28, Delkanda, Nugegoda in the said Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the VENDEE which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said ANOMA PILAPITIYA for the absolute sale and transfer unto the said VENDEE and their heirs, executors, administrators and assignees all that divided and defined allotment of land marked lot 2 together with the right of way over lot 6 depicted in Plan No. 635 dated 2008.10.15 made by Ishara Mahanama , Licensed surveyor which is morefully described in the schedule hereto for a sum of RUPEES TWENTY MILLION EIGHT HUNDRED THOUSAND (20,800,000/=) of lawful money of the Republic of Sri Lanka.

NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESS that the said VENDOR in pursuance of the said Agreement and in consideration of the said sum of RUPEES TWENTY ION EIGHT HUNDRED THOU (Rs. 20,800,000/=) of lawful money of the said Republic of Sri Lanka well and truly paid to the VENDOR by the said Vendee(the receipt whereof the VENDOR do hereby expressly admit and acknowledge) doth hereby sell ,grant, convey, assign, transfer, set over and assure unto the said VENDEE the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto together with all and singular the rights, ways, privileges, easements advantages, servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever thereunto belonging or appertaining or usually held used occupied enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof and all the estate right title interest property benefit claim and demand whatsoever of the said VENDOR into upon or out of the said allotment of land and every part thereof.

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said allotment of land hereby sold granted conveyed and assured or expressed or intended so to be together with all the rights and appurtenances thereunto belonging unto the VENDEE absolutely and forever.

AND the said VENDOR doth hereby covenant promise and agree with the said VENDEE, that the said VENDEE shall and may at all times hereafter peaceably and quietly possess and enjoy the said allotments of land hereby sold and conveyed and receive the rents income issues and profits thereof without any interruption or disturbance by the said VENDOR or any other person or persons whomsoever lawfully claiming any right or title thereto and that the said VENDOR has good right and full power and lawful and absolute authority to transfer and convey the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from all encumbrances whatsoever and not subject to any mortgage charge lien seizure sequestration partition or other proceedings or encumbrance whatsoever and that the said VENDOR has not at any time heretofore made done or committed or been party or privy to any act deed matter or thing whereby or by means or reason whereof the said allotment of land hereby granted conveyed and assured or expressed or intended so to be or any part or parties the said VENDOR shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto and every part or portion thereof unto the said VENDEE against any and every person or persons whomsoever and that the said VENDOR shall and will at all times hereafter at the request and cost of the said VENDEE make doth and execute or cause or procure to be done executed and perfected all such further and other acts deeds assurances matters and things for better and more perfectly and satisfactorily and effectually conveying assuring and vesting the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto unto and in the said VENDEE as by it shall or may be reasonably required.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said VENDOR doth hereunto and to two others from the same tenor and date as these presents set his hand at Mt Lavinia on this Twenty-ninth(29th) day of July Two Thousand and Seventeen (2017).

K. S. Ranasinghe
Attorney-at-Law & Notary Public
No. 15, Temple Road, Kandy
Prior Registration:- L.R.O. Kandy Folio G/125/88

DEED OF GIFT
No. 789
KNOW ALL MEN BY THESE PRESENTS THAT GAMINI JAYASUNDARA of No. 21, Bahirawakanda, Kandy (hereinafter called and referred to as the Donor) in consideration of the natural love and affection which the said Donor has and bears unto his son ARJUNA JAYASUNDARA also of No. 21, Bahirawakanda, Kandy (hereinafter called and referred to as the Donee) and for diverse other good causes and considerations hereunto specially moving do hereby give grant convey assign transfer set over and assure unto the said Donee as a gift inter vivos absolute and irrevocable, the property in the Schedule hereto fully described and together with all rights privileges easements servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever to the said premises belonging or used or enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof and all the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the said Donor of in to upon or out of the same.
TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described which are of the value of RUPEES FIFTY MILLION (Rs. 50,000,000/-) unto the said Donee and his heirs executors and administrators forever.
AND the said Donor does hereby for himself his heirs executors and administrators covenant and declare to and with the said Donee that the said Donor now has good right to convey the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from encumbrances whatsoever and that the said Donor and his aforewritten have not made done or committed or been party or privy to any act deed matter or thing whereby or by reason whereof the said premises or any part or portion thereof are is can shall or may be impeached or encumbered in title charge estate or otherwise howsoever and that the said Donor and his aforewritten shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said premises unto the said Donee against any person or persons whomsoever.
AND the said Donee ARJUNA JAYASUNDARA does hereby thankfully accept the gift hereby made.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said Donor and the said Donee do hereunto and to two others of the same tenor and date as these presents set their respective hands at Kandy on this Fifteenth (15th) day of November Two Thousand and Twenty-Five (2025).
THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO-

K. Bandara, on the SOUTH by Lot B in the same plan, and on the WEST by property of S. Dissanayake, and containing in extent TWENTY PERCHES (A0.R0.P20.00) together with the house bearing Assessment No. 21 and everything standing thereon.
We do hereby declare that we are well acquainted with the Donor and the Donee and know their proper name, occupation, and residence.
WITNESSES
M. Silva
R. Fernando

MORTGAGE BOND

No…..
TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS shall come MERINE (PRIVATE) LIMITED a Company duly re-registered under the Provisions of the Companies Act No 7 of 2007 bearing registration No PV35412 having its registered office at No. 12, Esther Lane, Colombo 7 in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter called and referred to as “the First named Mortgagor” which term or expression shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said MERINE (PRIVATE) LIMITED its successor/s in office and assigns) and PIPE CONDOMINIUMS (PRIVATE) LIMITED a Company duly re-registered under the Provisions of the Companies Act No: 7 of 2007 bearing registration No PV 11462 having its registered Office at No.480, Horton Place, Colombo 07 in the said Republic (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Second named Mortgagor” which term or expression shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said PIPE CONDOMINIUMS (PRIVATE) LIMITED its successor/s in office and assigns).

 S E N D G R E E T I N G S
WHEREAS:
the First and Second named Mortgagors (hereinafter jointly and severally called and referred to as the said “Mortgagors” ) are seized and possessed of and or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the Apartment Unit No 1C/F9/P3 fully described in the Schedule hereto (hereinafter referred to as the “Building Unit”) together with title to a proportionate undivided share in the Common Elements appurtenant to the said Building Unit as provided in the Semi Condominium Plan No.5741 dated 4th October 2008 made by M.A. Kalinga Licensed Surveyor;

the Mortgagors have requested SHANAKA WEERASNGHE (holder of Sri Lankan Passport No N0745749) of No. 23/1 Old Road, Wellawatta in the said Republic (hereinafter called and referred to as the “Mortgagee” which term or expression shall mean and include the said SHANAKA WEERASNGHE his heirs executors administrators and assigns) to purchase the Building Unit from the Mortgagors for an aggregate amount of Rupees Ten Million (Rs. 10,000,000/-) (hereinafter referred to as “the Facility”); 

the Mortgagors have agreed to complete the construction of the said Building Unit and hand over vacant possession of the said Building Unit to the Mortgagee on or before April 2015 and has agreed to enter into and execute these Presents to give and grant the security hereinafter mentioned for the purpose of securing the due completion of the said Building Unit and/or the repayment of the said Facility together with interest, costs and other charges in the event of a default, subject to the terms and conditions contained in these Presents.

NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESSETH that the Mortgagors do hereby covenant and agree with and bind and oblige themselves with the Mortgagee that the Mortgagors shall and will well and truly pay or cause to be paid all and every the sums and sum of money which now are or is or which shall or may at any time and from time to time and at all times hereafter be or become due owing and payable to the Mortgagee from and by the Mortgagors under and in terms of these presents together with interest costs and other charges. 
AND as security for such payment as aforesaid to the Mortgagee:
FIRSTLY - the Mortgagors do hereby specially mortgage and hypothecate to and with the said Mortgagee as a primary mortgage free from any and all seizures charges liens and encumbrances or claims whatsoever the entirety of the Building Unit described in the Schedule hereto together with the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the Mortgagors in to out of or upon the same (hereinafter referred to as “the said property hereby mortgaged and hypothecated”).
SECONDLY – the Mortgagors do hereby cede assign set over and assure with the said Mortgagee by way of a good and valid primary mortgage and hypothecation free from any and all seizures charges liens encumbrances all sums of money which may be recoverable or receivable under all and every contracts and contract of insurance already effected or which may hereafter from time to time be effected in respect of the said property hereby mortgaged and hypothecated and all the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the Mortgagors in to out of or upon the same
(All of which property above referred to and hereby mortgaged hypothecated and assigned are together hereinafter referred to as “the mortgaged property”).
AND the Mortgagors do hereby covenant and agree with the said Mortgagee as follows:
(1) that the Mortgagors have good and legal right and full power and authority to mortgage hypothecate and assign the said mortgaged property in the manner aforesaid and that the same is the absolute property of and is at the full disposal of the Mortgagors and is not subject to any proceedings for acquisition or requisition by the Government or any State sponsored Corporation or other authority and that the said mortgaged property are not subject to any seizure charge lien or encumbrance whatsoever and that the Mortgagors shall and will at the request of the said Mortgagee but at the cost and expense of the Mortgagors do and execute or cause to be done and executed all such further and other acts deeds matters assurances and things for the more perfectly and effectually assuring to the said Mortgagee by way of primary mortgage hypothecation and assignment as aforesaid the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof as by the said Mortgagee shall or may be reasonably required;
(2) that the Mortgagors shall not pledge mortgage hypothecate assign or create any lien or charge on the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof and shall not and will not suffer any part or portion thereof to be seized or taken in execution of any judgement/s or under or in respect of any other claim/s or proceedings whatsoever; 
(3) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times keep and maintain the said mortgaged property and every part or portion thereof in a fit and proper state of management repair and condition and shall and will permit any person/s duly authorized by the said Mortgagee from time to time to visit and inspect the state and order of the said mortgaged property and every part or portion thereof;
4) that the Mortgagors shall and will deliver to the said Mortgagee on the last day of each and every month a duly authenticated statement of the monies spent on the development of the said mortgaged property hereby assigned or expressed or intended so to be and which come under the operation of these Presents; 
(5) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times regularly and punctually pay the rates taxes assessments charges premia duties levies impositions outgoings and expenses whatsoever in respect of the said mortgaged property and procure official receipts therefore and shall and will whenever required to do so by the said Mortgagee forthwith deliver the said official receipts or any other writings documents relative to or as proof of any such payments aforesaid;
(6) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times at their own cost and expense insure and keep insured in the joint names of the Mortgagors as the Owner in respect of the said mortgaged property and the said Mortgagee against loss damage or destruction by fire lightning explosion malicious agency riots and strikes and such other causes and contingencies of the said mortgaged property to the full insurable value thereof with any insurer and shall and will regularly and punctually pay all and every the premia and premium or sums or sum of money for the time being necessary for keeping on foot the said policy or policies of insurance and shall and will whenever requested by the said Mortgagee forthwith deliver the receipts for the same and shall and will observe and comply with all and singular the terms and conditions and provisions of such policy or policies of insurance;
(7) that in case the said mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof be burnt down destroyed by fire or lightning or explosion or malicious agency or riots or strikes or any other cause or contingency insured against then and in any such case and as often as the same shall happen all such sums or sum of money as shall be received or be recoverable by virtue of any such insurance or insurances shall be paid by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee and shall at the option of the said Mortgagee be applied towards the discharge or part discharge of the moneys then due owing and payable by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee under or in respect of these Presents;
(8) That the Mortgagors shall and will during the continuance of the mortgage and hypothecation effected by these Presents duly and faithfully observe perform and comply with the obligations undertakings agreements and covenants on the part of the Mortgagors contained in these Presents; 
(9) Until there is a default and unless otherwise directed by the said Mortgagee the Mortgagors shall be at liberty in the ordinary course of business to sell all or any of the mortgaged property with the written consent of the said Mortgagee within the operation of these Presents. In the event of the mortgage and hypothecation and assignment created by these Presents being enforced and if the Mortgagors are called upon to do so the Mortgagors shall and will upon receipt of the proceeds of every such sale or recovery pay the same forthwith to the said Mortgagee in or towards the discharge or part discharge of the monies then due owing and payable by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee in respect of these Presents; 

AND it is hereby expressly agreed and declared as follows:

(a) that if the Mortgagors shall fail or neglect to keep the mortgaged property insured as aforesaid or deliver to the said Mortgagee the policy or policies of insurance or the receipts for the payment of premia as aforesaid or shall fail or neglect to duly pay the rates taxes assessments and other outgoings or to deliver to the said Mortgagee the official receipts thereof as hereinbefore provided or shall fail or neglect to pay any other sums or sum of money payable in fulfillment of the covenants herein contained then and in any such case it shall be lawful for but not obligatory on the said Mortgagee to pay all such premia duties outgoings and expenses and all costs payments and expenses for effecting or keeping on foot such insurances and rents rates taxes assessments and other outgoings and such other sums or sum of money aforesaid and the same together with interest thereon at the rate or rates in these Presents provided/directed shall on demand be payable to the said Mortgagee ( as the case may be) and be recoverable from the Mortgagors and shall be charged specially upon the mortgaged property and shall be covered by the mortgage hypothecation and assignment hereby given and granted or expressed or intended so to be;
(b) that the acceptance by the said Mortgagee of the security created and effected by these Presents shall in no way or manner prejudice or affect any lien to which the said Mortgagee is by law entitled or any other securities which the said Mortgagee already hold or may at any time and from time to time hereafter hold from or on account of the Mortgagors;
(c) that if the Mortgagors shall make default in the payment of any money hereby secured or shall commit a breach of any of the covenants herein contained and on the part of the Mortgagors to be kept done observed and performed or if the Mortgagors shall at any time during the continuance of the mortgage and hypothecation effected by these Presents be wound up be liquidated or enter into a composition with their respective creditors or if proceedings are taken for the winding up of the Mortgagors (whether voluntary or otherwise) or if the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof is seized or taken in execution or similar proceedings which may be available under the law of Sri Lanka or if the Mortgagors shall cease to carry on business or if any circumstance shall arise which in the reasonable opinion of the said Mortgagee may endanger the security constituted by these Presents then and in any such case it shall be lawful for the said Mortgagee to take all such steps as the said Mortgagee consider necessary to protect his interests and to enter upon and take possession of the said mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof and of the documents of title contracts and other documents whatsoever relating to the said mortgaged property with full power to sell or dispose of the same or any part or portion thereof and all costs and expenses of such sale or disposal or in any way incidental thereto (all of which costs and expenses shall be charged specially upon the mortgaged property and shall be covered by the mortgage hypothecation and assignment hereby given and granted or expressed or intended so to be) have been fully paid and liquidated or to exercise the powers and remedies available to the said Mortgagee under any law or legislation in Sri Lanka or at once to sue for and recover payment from the Mortgagors of all moneys due under or secured by these Presents and to obtain a hypothecary decree in respect of the said mortgaged property hereby mortgaged against the Mortgagors and to take such and all other steps to protect the interests of the said Mortgagee or if the said Mortgagee shall think fit so to do also at any time to adopt the above remedies simultaneously or successively for recovering payment of the said moneys and in the event of the said Mortgagee suing for the recovery of the moneys aforesaid the Mortgagors do hereby expressly agree that the said Mortgagee shall be entitled to have a Receiver appointed in respect of the mortgaged property pending such action who in addition to the powers and authorities conferred by law or by a competent court shall be vested with all the rights powers and authorities hereby given to the said Mortgagee without prejudice however to the right hereby given to the said Mortgagee to enter upon and take possession of the property hereby mortgaged with all the rights powers and authorities hereinbefore given;
(d) this Deed shall be security to the said Mortgagee for the balance due or from time to time due by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee in relation to the monies due owing and payable by the Mortgagors in terms of these presents it being intended that the total amount of the monies hereby secured or to be ultimately recoverable by the said Mortgagee in terms of these presents from and out of the security created hereby shall not exceed the sum of Rupees Ten million (Rs. 10,000,000/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka and interest costs expenses and other charges thereon; 
(e) any statement extract writing or other documents showing the amounts due by the Mortgagors under these presents and made out of the books or documents of the said Mortgagee and signed and certified by the said Mortgagee or by any person/s who may be specially appointed for that purpose by the said Mortgagee shall be presumed to be correct in the absence of manifest error;
(f) that every notice given or demand made under this Deed and every summons or notice of any kind whatsoever in connection with any action suit or proceedings taken under these Presents shall be taken and deemed to have been duly served upon the Mortgagors if the same be sent by post under registered cover addressed to the respective Mortgagors at the respective addresses hereinbefore mentioned or to the registered office for the time being of the Mortgagors; 
(i) That this Deed shall be governed by and construed according to the laws of Sri Lanka.

S E N D G R E E T I N G S

NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSES that in pursuance of the said agreement and in consideration of a sum of Rupees Seven Million One Hundred and Forty Nine Thousand Six Hundred (Rs 7,149,600/-) being lease rental for the said full period of Six (06) years payable as provided hereinafter to hold the premises bearing assessment No: 15/1 Mahanuga Gardens, Colombo 3.
 
ON THIS INDENTURE FURTHER WITNESSETH and it is hereby mutually agreed by and between the Lessor and Lessees as follows:-
NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSETH :-

That in consideration of the sum of Rupees Seven Million One Hundred and Forty Nine Thousand Six Hundred (Rs 7,149,600/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka in total for the Six(06) years rental and in consideration of the rents hereafter reserved and of the covenants and agreements hereinafter contained and on the part of the Lessees to be paid done observed and performed, the Lessor doth hereby let lease and demise unto the Lessees the said premises described in the Schedule hereto (hereinafter called and referred to as the “demised premises”) together with the furniture, fixtures and fittings and the movable property affixed or lying therein and shown in the inventory signed by the parties hereto for the purpose of identification.
 
2. TO HOLD the demised premises with all rights and appurtenances thereto unto the Lessees for the full term or period of Six (06) Years commencing from 1st day of February Two thousand and Seventeen and ending on 31st day of January Two Thousand and Twenty Three. 
.
YIELDING AND PAYING THEREFOR by the Lessees unto the Lessor during the said term of Six (06) Years the total lease rental of Rupees Seven Million One Hundred and Forty Nine Thousand Six Hundred (Rs 7,149,600/-) of lawful money to be paid as follows:

For the period 1st February 2017 to 31st January 2018 Rupees One Million Eighty Thousand (Rs 1,080,000/-) to be paid at or before the execution of these presents.
For the period 1st February 2018 to 31st January 2019 Rupees a sum of Rupees One Million Eighty Thousand (Rs 1,080,000/-) to be paid on or before the 1st of January 2018. 
For the period 1st February 2019 to 31st January 2020 a sum of Rupees One Million One Hundred and Eighty Eight Thousand (Rs 1,188,000/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2019. 
For the period 1st February 2020 to 31st January 2021 a sum of Rupees One Million One Hundred and Eighty Eight Thousand (Rs 1,188,000/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2020. 
For the period 1st February 2021 to 31st January 2022 a sum of Rupees One Million Three Hundred and Six Eight Hundred (Rs 1,306,800/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2021. 
For the period 1st February 2022 to 31st January 2023 a sum of Rupees One Million Three Hundred and Six Eight Hundred (Rs 1,306,800/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2022. 

3. On the signing of this agreement, the Lessees shall make a Refundable Security Deposit amounting to Rupees One Hundred and Eighty Thousand (Rs 180,000/-) for the full and faithful performance by the Lessees of all the terms, covenants and conditions of the agreement upon the Lesse’s part to be performed, which said sum (or balance thereof not used by the Lessor for purposes hereinafter provided) shall be returned to the Lessees upon the termination of this Lease free of interest and less any arrears of rent, electricity bills, water bills, telephone bills, cable television bills, damages and other charges due from the Lessees to the Lessor, provided that the Lessees has fully and faithfully carried out all the said terms, covenants and conditions on his/her part to be performed. The Lessor may use and deduct from the said deposit or such part thereof as is required to remedy any breach by the Lessees of any of the covenants contained in this Agreement. 

4. THE LESSEES TO THE INTENT THAT THE OBLIGATIONS MAY CONTINUE THROUGHOUT THE TERM HEREBY CREATED COVENANTS WITH THE LESSOR AS FOLLOWS :-

To pay the reserved rent on the days and in the manner aforesaid.
 
To use the demised premises in a careful and proper manner exclusively to carry out and maintain a legal firm.

To keep the premises hereby demised in a clean and sanitary condition and in strict conformity with the by- laws regulations or other rules or laws of the Municipal Council of Colombo and to keep the Lessor indemnified and freed from and against any liability for breach or non performance of any such laws including the laws respecting the sanitation and conservancy of the City of Colombo. 

To pay all meter and other charges incidental to the supply and consumption of water, telephone, electricity and cable charges at the demised premises and copies of receipts for such payments shall be handed to the Lessor at Lessor’s request and to effect at the Lessee’s cost and expense all repairs caused by ordinary wear and tear or repairs to damages caused by any negligence or willful act on the part of the Lessees or any lawful occupants of the demised premises.

To pay the difference between the rates (Municipal Taxes) now existing and any increased or enhanced rates by virtue of carrying the business as a legal firm.
Not to sub-let or sub-lease the demised premises or assign these presents or part with the possession thereof to any person or persons. 

To replace or repair at the Lessee’s cost and expense all inventorised appliances fixtures and fittings in the demised premises that are damaged and/or lost prior to the vacation of the demised premises. 

 To allow and permit the Lessor or her Agents to enter into the demised premises (with prior notice to the Lessees) during the day time to view and inspect the condition of the demised premises.

To keep, maintain and clean the interior and exterior of the demised premises and all additions hereto including the walls ceilings floors door-frames sinks sewers septic tanks and electrical wiring and fans sanitary and water apparatus in the same state repair and condition as at the commencement of These Presents and at all times to maintain the same in good tenantable repair and condition fair wear and tear excepted.

All interior installations and air conditioners fitted by the Lessees shall be fitted or fixed subject to the prior approval of the Lessor and at the cost and expense of the Lessees and the Lessees shall be entitled to remove same at any time paying to the Lessor the cost of repairing any damage that may be caused to the demised premises by such removal

Not to make any alterations or renovations or additions structural or otherwise to the property and premises hereby demised or to cut maim or injure any of the walls or timbers thereof or to permit any of the aforesaid things to be done without the written consent of the Lessor and not to cause any damage to the demised premises. 

To effect all repairs to the demised premises the cost of any single item of repair which does not exceed Rupees Twelve Thousand (Rs.12,000/=) at any one time provided however the Lessees shall not be entitled to claim any compensation from the Lessor for any improvements and/or renovations caused to the demised premises by the Lessees.

Not to store or bring to the demised premises any articles combustible inflammable or of a dangerous nature and not to-do or permit to be done anything on the demised premises provided that this shall not preclude the Lessees from bringing in containers of gas and fuel for domestic use of the Lessees or vehicles of the Lessees.

Not to use the demised premises for any illegal or immoral activities.

The Lessees shall at the request of the Lessor or her agent or representative permit any intending purchaser or Lessees during the last Three ( 03 ) months of this lease and prospective tenant or any surveyor or valuer or agent intending to purchase or lease as aforesaid at all reasonable times in the day after previous notice to the Lessees to enter and view the demised premises and such intending purchaser Lessees or prospective tenant, surveyor, valuer or agent maybe accompanied if desired by an employee or agent of the Lessor.

At the expiration or sooner determination of these presents to hand over peaceful and vacant possession of the demised premises in good order repair and condition and all furniture and fixtures complete and belonging to the Lessor in good order and condition fair wear and tear excepted. 

No pets shall be allowed, even temporarily, anywhere on the leased premises, without the prior written consent of the Lessor. The Lessees will be subject to charges, damages and eviction provisions of this lease if this provision is violated. If a pet has been kept on the leased premises at any time during the lease, the Refundable Security Deposit will be forfeited

The Lessees shall be responsible for any loss accident damage injury that shall occur within the said Premises or caused by the Lessees and in no way to hold the Lessor liable for the same and not to take any claim whatsoever against the Lessor in respect of any such loss accident damage or injury and to indemnify and keep the Lessor at all times indemnified against any claim demand or action in respect of same.

5. THE LESSOR DOTH HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :- 
To pay and discharge all rates, taxes and assessments payable in respect of the demised premises save and except the difference between the rates and taxes provided for in Clause 4 (e) hereof. 

To effect all repairs to the demised premises that exceed Rupees Twelve Thousand (Rs.12,000/=) at any one time other than the repairs referred to in clauses 4 (d) and (g) hereof

To warrant and defend the title to the demised premises and every part thereof and indemnify and saved harmless at all times from all claims demands costs damages losses or outgoing which may be incurred or suffered by the Lessees arising out of the title to the demised premises.

The Lessees duly paying the rents hereby reserved and observing and performing the several covenants and conditions herein on the Lesse’s part contained shall peaceably and quietly hold occupy and enjoy the demised premises during the term hereby granted without any interruption or eviction by the Lessor or any person claiming under her. 

If any of the covenants and conditions on the part of the Lessees herein contained shall not be performed or observed then and in any such cause the Lessor shall give to the Lessees not less than Thirty (30) days notice in writing requesting the Lessees to perform or observed the said covenants or conditions and if on the expiration of the said period of thirty days the Lessees shall not have performed or observed the said covenants then and in any such case the Lessor shall be entitled to give Ninety (90) days notice of Termination of Lease. 

6. PROVIDED ALWAYS AND IT IS HEREBY MUTUALLY AGREED BY AND BETWEEN THE LESSOR AND THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :-

If the rent hereby reserved or any part thereof shall be unpaid for a period of one month after becoming due (whether formally demanded or not) or if there be any attachment on the premises or if the Lessees commits a breach of any of the covenants and conditions herein contained then and in any such case it shall be lawful for the Lessor to re-enter upon the said demised premises or any part thereof in the name of the whole and to have again repossess and enjoy the same and to eject the Lessees their servants agents and all those holding under them therefrom and determine this lease and thereupon this lease shall absolutely cease and determine anything herein contained to the contrary notwithstanding and the Lessor shall be entitled to claim and recover from the Lessees all monies payable as arrears of rent, electricity, water bills and damages.

The parties hereto agree that the provisions of the Rent Act No. 7 of 1982 as amended do not apply to the demised premises. 

The Lessor may on the written request of the Lessees made not less than Ninety (90) days before the expiration of the term hereof and if there shall not at any time of such request be any existing breach or non performance of any of the covenants on the part of the Lessees hereinbefore contained grant the Lessees a renewal of the Lease of the demised premises for a further period on fresh terms and conditions to be mutually determined and agreed upon by the Lessor and the Lessees at that time
At the expiration or sooner determination of this lease if the Lessees fails to yield up and deliver vacant possession of the demised premises unto the Lessor then the Lessees shall pay the Lessor damages at the rate of Rupees Ten Thousand (Rs.10,000/=) per day from the expiration or sooner determination of this lease until possession is handed over as aforesaid without prejudice to the Lessor’s right to take possession and eject the Lessees from the demised premises or to the Lessor’s right to file action against the Lessees for ejectment from the demised premises. 

Either Party may give Ninety (90) days prior notice to the other in writing and terminate this contract by mutual consent after the first year of the lease. 

Stamp duty, fees for drafting, engrossing and attesting these presents shall be borne by the Lessor and the Lessees in equal shares. 

Any notice required to be given hereunder shall be sufficiently and duly given if sent by Registered Post to the Lessor to No.15 Mahanuge Gardens Colombo 03 and to the Lessees to the demised premises or the offices of the Lessees.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the Lessor and the Lessees have set their respective hands hereunto and to three others of the same tenor and date as these presents at Colombo on this 11th day of August Two thousand and Seventeen.

AND MR. KAVINDA PRASAD PERERA (holder of N.I.C. No. 880211456V) and MRS. ISHARA DILRUKSHI PERERA (holder of N.I.C No. 895432789V) both of No. 78, W.A. Silva Mawatha, Colombo 06 (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Lessees” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said KAVINDA PRASAD PERERA and ISHARA DILRUKSHI PERERA their respective heirs, executors, administrators and assigns) of the Other Part.
WITNESSETH
WHEREAS under and by virtue of Deed of Transfer bearing No. 921 dated 10th January 2011 attested by K.L. Fernando, Notary Public of Colombo the said Lessor became the owner and seized and possessed of or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the premises bearing assessment No. 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala more fully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto.
AND WHEREAS the said Lessor has agreed to lease and the Lessees have agreed to take on lease the premises bearing assessment No: 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala more fully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto for and during the term or period of Two (02) years commencing from the 1st day of June Two thousand and Twenty-Four and ending on the 31st day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Six subject to the terms and conditions hereinafter set forth and contained.
NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSES that in pursuance of the said agreement and in consideration of the rent hereinafter reserved and of the covenants on the part of the Lessees to be performed and observed the Lessor doth hereby demise and let unto the Lessees the premises bearing assessment No: 34/A, Hill Street, Dehiwala.
ON THIS INDENTURE FURTHER WITNESSETH and it is hereby mutually agreed by and between the Lessor and Lessees as follows:-
1. TO HOLD the demised premises with all rights and appurtenances thereto unto the Lessees for the full term or period of Two (02) Years commencing from 1st day of June Two thousand and Twenty-Four and ending on 31st day of May Two Thousand and Twenty-Six.
2. YIELDING AND PAYING THEREFOR by the Lessees unto the Lessor during the said term the monthly rental of Rupees One Hundred and Fifty Thousand (Rs 150,000/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka, payable on or before the fifth (5th) day of each and every month.
3. REFUNDABLE SECURITY DEPOSIT: On the signing of this agreement, the Lessees shall make a Refundable Security Deposit amounting to Rupees Nine Hundred Thousand (Rs 900,000/-), equivalent to six months' rent, which sum shall be returned to the Lessees upon the termination of this Lease free of interest and less any arrears of rent, utility bills, or costs for damages beyond fair wear and tear.
4. THE LESSEES HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSOR AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) To pay the reserved rent on the days and in the manner aforesaid.
(b) To use the demised premises for residential purposes for the Lessees and their immediate family only.
(c) To keep the interior of the demised premises in good and tenantable repair and condition.
(d) To pay all charges for electricity, water, telephone, internet, and any other utilities consumed at the premises.
(e) Not to sub-let or part with the possession of the premises or any part thereof.
(f) To permit the Lessor or his agents with prior notice to enter and inspect the premises at reasonable times.
(g) Not to make any structural alterations to the premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor.
(h) At the expiration or sooner determination of the lease, to hand over vacant possession of the premises in the same good order and condition as it was received, fair wear and tear excepted.
5. THE LESSOR DOTH HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) To pay all rates, taxes, and assessments payable in respect of the demised premises.
(b) To carry out all major structural repairs to the demised premises when necessary.
(c) That the Lessees, paying the rent and observing the covenants herein, shall peaceably and quietly hold and enjoy the demised premises during the said term without any interruption by the Lessor.
6. PROVIDED ALWAYS AND IT IS HEREBY MUTUALLY AGREED AS FOLLOWS :-
(a) If the rent shall be in arrears for thirty (30) days, or if the Lessees shall breach any covenant herein, the Lessor may re-enter the premises and thereupon this lease shall determine.
(b) The provisions of the Rent Act No. 7 of 1972 and its subsequent amendments shall not apply to the demised premises.
(c) Either party may terminate this agreement after the first six (06) months by giving three (03) months' prior written notice to the other party.
(d) Stamp duty and all other costs related to the execution of this indenture shall be borne by the Lessees.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the parties have set their hands hereunto at Dehiwala on the date first above written.

 S E N D G R E E T I N G S
WHEREAS:
the First and Second named Mortgagors (hereinafter jointly and severally called and referred to as the said “Mortgagors” ) are seized and possessed of and or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the Apartment Unit No 1C/F9/P3 fully described in the Schedule hereto (hereinafter referred to as the “Building Unit”) together with title to a proportionate undivided share in the Common Elements appurtenant to the said Building Unit as provided in the Semi Condominium Plan No.5741 dated 4th October 2008 made by M.A. Kalinga Licensed Surveyor;

the Mortgagors have requested SHANAKA WEERASNGHE (holder of Sri Lankan Passport No N0745749) of No. 23/1 Old Road, Wellawatta in the said Republic (hereinafter called and referred to as the “Mortgagee” which term or expression shall mean and include the said SHANAKA WEERASNGHE his heirs executors administrators and assigns) to purchase the Building Unit from the Mortgagors for an aggregate amount of Rupees Ten Million (Rs. 10,000,000/-) (hereinafter referred to as “the Facility”); 

the Mortgagors have agreed to complete the construction of the said Building Unit and hand over vacant possession of the said Building Unit to the Mortgagee on or before April 2015 and has agreed to enter into and execute these Presents to give and grant the security hereinafter mentioned for the purpose of securing the due completion of the said Building Unit and/or the repayment of the said Facility together with interest, costs and other charges in the event of a default, subject to the terms and conditions contained in these Presents.

NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESSETH that the Mortgagors do hereby covenant and agree with and bind and oblige themselves with the Mortgagee that the Mortgagors shall and will well and truly pay or cause to be paid all and every the sums and sum of money which now are or is or which shall or may at any time and from time to time and at all times hereafter be or become due owing and payable to the Mortgagee from and by the Mortgagors under and in terms of these presents together with interest costs and other charges. 
AND as security for such payment as aforesaid to the Mortgagee:
FIRSTLY - the Mortgagors do hereby specially mortgage and hypothecate to and with the said Mortgagee as a primary mortgage free from any and all seizures charges liens and encumbrances or claims whatsoever the entirety of the Building Unit described in the Schedule hereto together with the estate right title interest property claim and demand whatsoever of the Mortgagors in to out of or upon the same (hereinafter referred to as “the said property hereby mortgaged and hypothecated”).

(All of which property above referred to and hereby mortgaged hypothecated and assigned are together hereinafter referred to as “the mortgaged property”).
AND the Mortgagors do hereby covenant and agree with the said Mortgagee as follows:
(1) that the Mortgagors have good and legal right and full power and authority to mortgage hypothecate and assign the said mortgaged property in the manner aforesaid and that the same is the absolute property of and is at the full disposal of the Mortgagors and is not subject to any proceedings for acquisition or requisition by the Government or any State sponsored Corporation or other authority and that the said mortgaged property are not subject to any seizure charge lien or encumbrance whatsoever and that the Mortgagors shall and will at the request of the said Mortgagee but at the cost and expense of the Mortgagors do and execute or cause to be done and executed all such further and other acts deeds matters assurances and things for the more perfectly and effectually assuring to the said Mortgagee by way of primary mortgage hypothecation and assignment as aforesaid the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof as by the said Mortgagee shall or may be reasonably required;
(2) that the Mortgagors shall not pledge mortgage hypothecate assign or create any lien or charge on the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof and shall not and will not suffer any part or portion thereof to be seized or taken in execution of any judgement/s or under or in respect of any other claim/s or proceedings whatsoever; 
(3) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times keep and maintain the said mortgaged property and every part or portion thereof in a fit and proper state of management repair and condition and shall and will permit any person/s duly authorized by the said Mortgagee from time to time to visit and inspect the state and order of the said mortgaged property and every part or portion thereof;
4) that the Mortgagors shall and will deliver to the said Mortgagee on the last day of each and every month a duly authenticated statement of the monies spent on the development of the said mortgaged property hereby assigned or expressed or intended so to be and which come under the operation of these Presents; 
(5) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times regularly and punctually pay the rates taxes assessments charges premia duties levies impositions outgoings and expenses whatsoever in respect of the said mortgaged property and procure official receipts therefore and shall and will whenever required to do so by the said Mortgagee forthwith deliver the said official receipts or any other writings documents relative to or as proof of any such payments aforesaid;
(6) that the Mortgagors shall and will at all times at their own cost and expense insure and keep insured in the joint names of the Mortgagors as the Owner in respect of the said mortgaged property and the said Mortgagee against loss damage or destruction by fire lightning explosion malicious agency riots and strikes and such other causes and contingencies of the said mortgaged property to the full insurable value thereof with any insurer and shall and will regularly and punctually pay all and every the premia and premium or sums or sum of money for the time being necessary for keeping on foot the said policy or policies of insurance and shall and will whenever requested by the said Mortgagee forthwith deliver the receipts for the same and shall and will observe and comply with all and singular the terms and conditions and provisions of such policy or policies of insurance;
(7) that in case the said mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof be burnt down destroyed by fire or lightning or explosion or malicious agency or riots or strikes or any other cause or contingency insured against then and in any such case and as often as the same shall happen all such sums or sum of money as shall be received or be recoverable by virtue of any such insurance or insurances shall be paid by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee and shall at the option of the said Mortgagee be applied towards the discharge or part discharge of the moneys then due owing and payable by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee under or in respect of these Presents;
(8) That the Mortgagors shall and will during the continuance of the mortgage and hypothecation effected by these Presents duly and faithfully observe perform and comply with the obligations undertakings agreements and covenants on the part of the Mortgagors contained in these Presents; 
(9) Until there is a default and unless otherwise directed by the said Mortgagee the Mortgagors shall be at liberty in the ordinary course of business to sell all or any of the mortgaged property with the written consent of the said Mortgagee within the operation of these Presents. In the event of the mortgage and hypothecation and assignment created by these Presents being enforced and if the Mortgagors are called upon to do so the Mortgagors shall and will upon receipt of the proceeds of every such sale or recovery pay the same forthwith to the said Mortgagee in or towards the discharge or part discharge of the monies then due owing and payable by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee in respect of these Presents; 

AND it is hereby expressly agreed and declared as follows:

(a) that if the Mortgagors shall fail or neglect to keep the mortgaged property insured as aforesaid or deliver to the said Mortgagee the policy or policies of insurance or the receipts for the payment of premia as aforesaid or shall fail or neglect to duly pay the rates taxes assessments and other outgoings or to deliver to the said Mortgagee the official receipts thereof as hereinbefore provided or shall fail or neglect to pay any other sums or sum of money payable in fulfillment of the covenants herein contained then and in any such case it shall be lawful for but not obligatory on the said Mortgagee to pay all such premia duties outgoings and expenses and all costs payments and expenses for effecting or keeping on foot such insurances and rents rates taxes assessments and other outgoings and such other sums or sum of money aforesaid and the same together with interest thereon at the rate or rates in these Presents provided/directed shall on demand be payable to the said Mortgagee ( as the case may be) and be recoverable from the Mortgagors and shall be charged specially upon the mortgaged property and shall be covered by the mortgage hypothecation and assignment hereby given and granted or expressed or intended so to be;
(b) that the acceptance by the said Mortgagee of the security created and effected by these Presents shall in no way or manner prejudice or affect any lien to which the said Mortgagee is by law entitled or any other securities which the said Mortgagee already hold or may at any time and from time to time hereafter hold from or on account of the Mortgagors;
(c) that if the Mortgagors shall make default in the payment of any money hereby secured or shall commit a breach of any of the covenants herein contained and on the part of the Mortgagors to be kept done observed and performed or if the Mortgagors shall at any time during the continuance of the mortgage and hypothecation effected by these Presents be wound up be liquidated or enter into a composition with their respective creditors or if proceedings are taken for the winding up of the Mortgagors (whether voluntary or otherwise) or if the mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof is seized or taken in execution or similar proceedings which may be available under the law of Sri Lanka or if the Mortgagors shall cease to carry on business or if any circumstance shall arise which in the reasonable opinion of the said Mortgagee may endanger the security constituted by these Presents then and in any such case it shall be lawful for the said Mortgagee to take all such steps as the said Mortgagee consider necessary to protect his interests and to enter upon and take possession of the said mortgaged property or any part or portion thereof and of the documents of title contracts and other documents whatsoever relating to the said mortgaged property with full power to sell or dispose of the same or any part or portion thereof and all costs and expenses of such sale or disposal or in any way incidental thereto (all of which costs and expenses shall be charged specially upon the mortgaged property and shall be covered by the mortgage hypothecation and assignment hereby given and granted or expressed or intended so to be) have been fully paid and liquidated or to exercise the powers and remedies available to the said Mortgagee under any law or legislation in Sri Lanka or at once to sue for and recover payment from the Mortgagors of all moneys due under or secured by these Presents and to obtain a hypothecary decree in respect of the said mortgaged property hereby mortgaged against the Mortgagors and to take such and all other steps to protect the interests of the said Mortgagee or if the said Mortgagee shall think fit so to do also at any time to adopt the above remedies simultaneously or successively for recovering payment of the said moneys and in the event of the said Mortgagee suing for the recovery of the moneys aforesaid the Mortgagors do hereby expressly agree that the said Mortgagee shall be entitled to have a Receiver appointed in respect of the mortgaged property pending such action who in addition to the powers and authorities conferred by law or by a competent court shall be vested with all the rights powers and authorities hereby given to the said Mortgagee without prejudice however to the right hereby given to the said Mortgagee to enter upon and take possession of the property hereby mortgaged with all the rights powers and authorities hereinbefore given;
(d) this Deed shall be security to the said Mortgagee for the balance due or from time to time due by the Mortgagors to the said Mortgagee in relation to the monies due owing and payable by the Mortgagors in terms of these presents it being intended that the total amount of the monies hereby secured or to be ultimately recoverable by the said Mortgagee in terms of these presents from and out of the security created hereby shall not exceed the sum of Rupees Ten million (Rs. 10,000,000/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka and interest costs expenses and other charges thereon; 
(e) any statement extract writing or other documents showing the amounts due by the Mortgagors under these presents and made out of the books or documents of the said Mortgagee and signed and certified by the said Mortgagee or by any person/s who may be specially appointed for that purpose by the said Mortgagee shall be presumed to be correct in the absence of manifest error;
(f) that every notice given or demand made under this Deed and every summons or notice of any kind whatsoever in connection with any action suit or proceedings taken under these Presents shall be taken and deemed to have been duly served upon the Mortgagors if the same be sent by post under registered cover addressed to the respective Mortgagors at the respective addresses hereinbefore mentioned or to the registered office for the time being of the Mortgagors; 
(i) That this Deed shall be governed by and construed according to the laws of Sri Lanka.

THIS INDENTURE is made and entered into at Colombo on this Eleventh day of August Two Thousand and Seventeen SHEENA TIYANI ILANGAKOON PERERA (holder of N.I.C No. 865250576V) of No.15 Mahanuga Gardens Colombo 03 (hereinafter called and referred to as “the Lessor” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said SHEENA TIYANI ILANGAKOON PERERA her heirs, executors, administrators and assigns) of the One Part 

AND M/s. Valoremjuris a Legal Partnership Firm, represented by its Partners Mrs. Suganthie Wijayasuriya Kadirgamar and Mr. Dilith Susantha Jayaweera a partnership duly incorporated in SRI LANKA (upon Certificate Registration No: W/ 205519) and having its Registered office at No: 4/6, Jeswel Place, Mirihana, Nugegoda in the said Republic (hereinafter called and referred to as “the LESSEES”) of the Other Part
WITNESSETH

WHEREAS under and by virtue of Deed of Gift bearing No. 1866 dated 30th July 2004 attested by Dijen Lea de Saram, Notary Public of Colombo the said Lessor became the owner and seized and possessed of or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to premises bearing assessment No 15/1 Mahanuga Gardens, Colombo 3 morefully described in the "SCHEDULE" hereto

AND WHEREAS the said Lessor have agreed to lease and the Lessees has agreed to take on lease the premises bearing assessment No: 15/1 Mahanuga Gardens, Colombo 3 morefully described in the "SHCEDULE" hereto for and during the term or period of Six (06) years commencing from from 1st day of February Two thousand and Seventeen and ending on 31st day of January Two Thousand and Twenty Three subject to the terms and conditions hereinafter set forth and contained.
 
NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSES that in pursuance of the said agreement and in consideration of a sum of Rupees Seven Million One Hundred and Forty Nine Thousand Six Hundred (Rs 7,149,600/-) being lease rental for the said full period of Six (06) years payable as provided hereinafter to hold the premises bearing assessment No: 15/1 Mahanuga Gardens, Colombo 3.
 
ON THIS INDENTURE FURTHER WITNESSETH and it is hereby mutually agreed by and between the Lessor and Lessees as follows:-
NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSETH :-

That in consideration of the sum of Rupees Seven Million One Hundred and Forty Nine Thousand Six Hundred (Rs 7,149,600/-) of lawful money of Sri Lanka in total for the Six(06) years rental and in consideration of the rents hereafter reserved and of the covenants and agreements hereinafter contained and on the part of the Lessees to be paid done observed and performed, the Lessor doth hereby let lease and demise unto the Lessees the said premises described in the Schedule hereto (hereinafter called and referred to as the “demised premises”) together with the furniture, fixtures and fittings and the movable property affixed or lying therein and shown in the inventory signed by the parties hereto for the purpose of identification.
 
2. TO HOLD the demised premises with all rights and appurtenances thereto unto the Lessees for the full term or period of Six (06) Years commencing from 1st day of February Two thousand and Seventeen and ending on 31st day of January Two Thousand and Twenty Three. 
.
YIELDING AND PAYING THEREFOR by the Lessees unto the Lessor during the said term of Six (06) Years the total lease rental of Rupees Seven Million One Hundred and Forty Nine Thousand Six Hundred (Rs 7,149,600/-) of lawful money to be paid as follows:

For the period 1st February 2017 to 31st January 2018 Rupees One Million Eighty Thousand (Rs 1,080,000/-) to be paid at or before the execution of these presents.
For the period 1st February 2018 to 31st January 2019 Rupees a sum of Rupees One Million Eighty Thousand (Rs 1,080,000/-) to be paid on or before the 1st of January 2018. 
For the period 1st February 2019 to 31st January 2020 a sum of Rupees One Million One Hundred and Eighty Eight Thousand (Rs 1,188,000/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2019. 
For the period 1st February 2020 to 31st January 2021 a sum of Rupees One Million One Hundred and Eighty Eight Thousand (Rs 1,188,000/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2020. 
For the period 1st February 2021 to 31st January 2022 a sum of Rupees One Million Three Hundred and Six Eight Hundred (Rs 1,306,800/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2021. 
For the period 1st February 2022 to 31st January 2023 a sum of Rupees One Million Three Hundred and Six Eight Hundred (Rs 1,306,800/-) to be paid on or before 1st of January 2022. 

3. On the signing of this agreement, the Lessees shall make a Refundable Security Deposit amounting to Rupees One Hundred and Eighty Thousand (Rs 180,000/-) for the full and faithful performance by the Lessees of all the terms, covenants and conditions of the agreement upon the Lesse’s part to be performed, which said sum (or balance thereof not used by the Lessor for purposes hereinafter provided) shall be returned to the Lessees upon the termination of this Lease free of interest and less any arrears of rent, electricity bills, water bills, telephone bills, cable television bills, damages and other charges due from the Lessees to the Lessor, provided that the Lessees has fully and faithfully carried out all the said terms, covenants and conditions on his/her part to be performed. The Lessor may use and deduct from the said deposit or such part thereof as is required to remedy any breach by the Lessees of any of the covenants contained in this Agreement. 

4. THE LESSEES TO THE INTENT THAT THE OBLIGATIONS MAY CONTINUE THROUGHOUT THE TERM HEREBY CREATED COVENANTS WITH THE LESSOR AS FOLLOWS :-

To pay the reserved rent on the days and in the manner aforesaid.
 
To use the demised premises in a careful and proper manner exclusively to carry out and maintain a legal firm.

To keep the premises hereby demised in a clean and sanitary condition and in strict conformity with the by- laws regulations or other rules or laws of the Municipal Council of Colombo and to keep the Lessor indemnified and freed from and against any liability for breach or non performance of any such laws including the laws respecting the sanitation and conservancy of the City of Colombo. 

To pay all meter and other charges incidental to the supply and consumption of water, telephone, electricity and cable charges at the demised premises and copies of receipts for such payments shall be handed to the Lessor at Lessor’s request and to effect at the Lessee’s cost and expense all repairs caused by ordinary wear and tear or repairs to damages caused by any negligence or willful act on the part of the Lessees or any lawful occupants of the demised premises.

To pay the difference between the rates (Municipal Taxes) now existing and any increased or enhanced rates by virtue of carrying the business as a legal firm.
Not to sub-let or sub-lease the demised premises or assign these presents or part with the possession thereof to any person or persons. 

To replace or repair at the Lessee’s cost and expense all inventorised appliances fixtures and fittings in the demised premises that are damaged and/or lost prior to the vacation of the demised premises. 

 To allow and permit the Lessor or her Agents to enter into the demised premises (with prior notice to the Lessees) during the day time to view and inspect the condition of the demised premises.

To keep, maintain and clean the interior and exterior of the demised premises and all additions hereto including the walls ceilings floors door-frames sinks sewers septic tanks and electrical wiring and fans sanitary and water apparatus in the same state repair and condition as at the commencement of These Presents and at all times to maintain the same in good tenantable repair and condition fair wear and tear excepted.

All interior installations and air conditioners fitted by the Lessees shall be fitted or fixed subject to the prior approval of the Lessor and at the cost and expense of the Lessees and the Lessees shall be entitled to remove same at any time paying to the Lessor the cost of repairing any damage that may be caused to the demised premises by such removal

Not to make any alterations or renovations or additions structural or otherwise to the property and premises hereby demised or to cut maim or injure any of the walls or timbers thereof or to permit any of the aforesaid things to be done without the written consent of the Lessor and not to cause any damage to the demised premises. 

To effect all repairs to the demised premises the cost of any single item of repair which does not exceed Rupees Twelve Thousand (Rs.12,000/=) at any one time provided however the Lessees shall not be entitled to claim any compensation from the Lessor for any improvements and/or renovations caused to the demised premises by the Lessees.

Not to store or bring to the demised premises any articles combustible inflammable or of a dangerous nature and not to-do or permit to be done anything on the demised premises provided that this shall not preclude the Lessees from bringing in containers of gas and fuel for domestic use of the Lessees or vehicles of the Lessees.

Not to use the demised premises for any illegal or immoral activities.

The Lessees shall at the request of the Lessor or her agent or representative permit any intending purchaser or Lessees during the last Three ( 03 ) months of this lease and prospective tenant or any surveyor or valuer or agent intending to purchase or lease as aforesaid at all reasonable times in the day after previous notice to the Lessees to enter and view the demised premises and such intending purchaser Lessees or prospective tenant, surveyor, valuer or agent maybe accompanied if desired by an employee or agent of the Lessor.

At the expiration or sooner determination of these presents to hand over peaceful and vacant possession of the demised premises in good order repair and condition and all furniture and fixtures complete and belonging to the Lessor in good order and condition fair wear and tear excepted. 

No pets shall be allowed, even temporarily, anywhere on the leased premises, without the prior written consent of the Lessor. The Lessees will be subject to charges, damages and eviction provisions of this lease if this provision is violated. If a pet has been kept on the leased premises at any time during the lease, the Refundable Security Deposit will be forfeited

The Lessees shall be responsible for any loss accident damage injury that shall occur within the said Premises or caused by the Lessees and in no way to hold the Lessor liable for the same and not to take any claim whatsoever against the Lessor in respect of any such loss accident damage or injury and to indemnify and keep the Lessor at all times indemnified against any claim demand or action in respect of same.

5. THE LESSOR DOTH HEREBY COVENANT WITH THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :- 
To pay and discharge all rates, taxes and assessments payable in respect of the demised premises save and except the difference between the rates and taxes provided for in Clause 4 (e) hereof. 

To effect all repairs to the demised premises that exceed Rupees Twelve Thousand (Rs.12,000/=) at any one time other than the repairs referred to in clauses 4 (d) and (g) hereof

To warrant and defend the title to the demised premises and every part thereof and indemnify and saved harmless at all times from all claims demands costs damages losses or outgoing which may be incurred or suffered by the Lessees arising out of the title to the demised premises.

The Lessees duly paying the rents hereby reserved and observing and performing the several covenants and conditions herein on the Lesse’s part contained shall peaceably and quietly hold occupy and enjoy the demised premises during the term hereby granted without any interruption or eviction by the Lessor or any person claiming under her. 

If any of the covenants and conditions on the part of the Lessees herein contained shall not be performed or observed then and in any such cause the Lessor shall give to the Lessees not less than Thirty (30) days notice in writing requesting the Lessees to perform or observed the said covenants or conditions and if on the expiration of the said period of thirty days the Lessees shall not have performed or observed the said covenants then and in any such case the Lessor shall be entitled to give Ninety (90) days notice of Termination of Lease. 

6. PROVIDED ALWAYS AND IT IS HEREBY MUTUALLY AGREED BY AND BETWEEN THE LESSOR AND THE LESSEES AS FOLLOWS :-

If the rent hereby reserved or any part thereof shall be unpaid for a period of one month after becoming due (whether formally demanded or not) or if there be any attachment on the premises or if the Lessees commits a breach of any of the covenants and conditions herein contained then and in any such case it shall be lawful for the Lessor to re-enter upon the said demised premises or any part thereof in the name of the whole and to have again repossess and enjoy the same and to eject the Lessees their servants agents and all those holding under them therefrom and determine this lease and thereupon this lease shall absolutely cease and determine anything herein contained to the contrary notwithstanding and the Lessor shall be entitled to claim and recover from the Lessees all monies payable as arrears of rent, electricity, water bills and damages.

The parties hereto agree that the provisions of the Rent Act No. 7 of 1982 as amended do not apply to the demised premises. 

The Lessor may on the written request of the Lessees made not less than Ninety (90) days before the expiration of the term hereof and if there shall not at any time of such request be any existing breach or non performance of any of the covenants on the part of the Lessees hereinbefore contained grant the Lessees a renewal of the Lease of the demised premises for a further period on fresh terms and conditions to be mutually determined and agreed upon by the Lessor and the Lessees at that time
At the expiration or sooner determination of this lease if the Lessees fails to yield up and deliver vacant possession of the demised premises unto the Lessor then the Lessees shall pay the Lessor damages at the rate of Rupees Ten Thousand (Rs.10,000/=) per day from the expiration or sooner determination of this lease until possession is handed over as aforesaid without prejudice to the Lessor’s right to take possession and eject the Lessees from the demised premises or to the Lessor’s right to file action against the Lessees for ejectment from the demised premises. 

Either Party may give Ninety (90) days prior notice to the other in writing and terminate this contract by mutual consent after the first year of the lease. 

Stamp duty, fees for drafting, engrossing and attesting these presents shall be borne by the Lessor and the Lessees in equal shares. 

Any notice required to be given hereunder shall be sufficiently and duly given if sent by Registered Post to the Lessor to No.15 Mahanuge Gardens Colombo 03 and to the Lessees to the demised premises or the offices of the Lessees.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the Lessor and the Lessees have set their respective hands hereunto and to three others of the same tenor and date as these presents at Colombo on this 11th day of August Two thousand and Seventeen.

GIFT FROM PARENT TO CHILD
(Life Interest Reserved – Right to Reside – Right to Collect Rent – Absolute Title After Death)

Code Number : 501/2027/CMB

: No. 60, Hulftsdorp Street, Colombo 12

DEED OF GIFT
No. 9901

TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME
I, MRS. SHANTHI WIJERATNE (holder of National Identity Card No. 640334455V) of No. 28, Lake Road, Nugegoda in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter called and referred to as “the DONOR” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include her heirs, executors, administrators and assigns)
—: SEND GREETINGS :—

WHEREAS
The Donor is seized and possessed of ALL THAT divided and defined allotment of land bearing Assessment No. 28 situated at Lake Road, Nugegoda together with the residential house standing thereon under and by virtue of Deed of Transfer No. 6102 dated 10th June 2012 attested by P. Fernando, Notary Public and registered in the Colombo Land Registry.
AND WHEREAS the Donee herein is the lawful son of the Donor.
AND WHEREAS the Donor, out of natural love and affection, desires to gift the said property unto her said son subject to reservation of life interest.

NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESS
That the said DONOR, in consideration of the natural love and affection which she bears towards her son MR. CHAMOD WIJERATNE (holder of National Identity Card No. 920445566V) of No. 28, Lake Road, Nugegoda (hereinafter referred to as “the DONEE” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns)
DOTH HEREBY GIVE, GRANT, CONVEY AND TRANSFER unto the said Donee:
ALL THAT the property morefully described in the Schedule hereto
SUBJECT HOWEVER to the reservations and conditions hereinafter contained.

RESERVATION OF LIFE INTEREST

1. RIGHT TO RESIDE
The Donor hereby expressly reserves unto herself for and during the term of her natural life:
The full and exclusive right to reside in and occupy the said house.
The right to peaceful and uninterrupted enjoyment of the premises.
The right to prevent eviction or interference by the Donee.

2. RIGHT TO COLLECT RENT
If the property or any part thereof is rented:
The Donor shall have full right to collect and retain all rental income during her lifetime.
The Donee shall not claim any rental income during the Donor’s lifetime.

3. MAINTENANCE DURING LIFE INTEREST
The Donor shall:
Maintain the property in reasonable repair.
Pay municipal rates and utility charges during her lifetime.

4. LIMITATION ON DONEE
During the lifetime of the Donor, the Donee shall not:
Sell, mortgage or encumber the property.
Interfere with the Donor’s life interest.
Demand possession of the property.

ABSOLUTE TITLE AFTER DEATH
Upon the death of the Donor:
The life interest shall cease and determine.
The Donee shall become absolutely entitled to the said property free from all encumbrances.
Full ownership and possession shall vest in the Donee without further act or deed.

5. IRREVOCABILITY
This Gift is made voluntarily and without coercion and shall be irrevocable.

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD
The said property unto the Donee subject to the life interest reserved unto the Donor as aforesaid.

THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO
ALL THAT divided and defined allotment of land bearing Assessment No. 28 situated at Lake Road within the limits of Sri Jayawardenapura Kotte Municipal Council in the District of Colombo Western Province containing in extent EIGHT DECIMAL ZERO ZERO PERCHES (A0 – R0 – P8) together with the single-storied residential house standing thereon.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF
The said Donor hath hereunto set her hand at Colombo on this Fifteenth (15th) day of February Two Thousand and Twenty Seven (2027).

WITNESSES

NOTARY ATTESTATION
I, K. W. Jayasinghe of Colombo in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Notary Public, do hereby certify and attest that the foregoing instrument was duly read over and explained by me to the within named MRS. SHANTHI WIJERATNE who is known to me and who signed the same in my presence and in the presence of the subscribing witnesses hereto all being present together at the same time.
I further certify that Stamp Duty amounting to Rs. 30,000/= was paid and that the original bears one adhesive stamp of Rs. 1/= supplied by me.
WHICH I ATTEST

(Seal)

AND WHEREAS they are seized and possessed of ALL THAT divided and defined allotment of land bearing Assessment No. 110 situated at Temple Road, Dehiwala together with the residential house standing thereon under and by virtue of Deed of Transfer No. 3344 dated 15th May 2008 attested by N. Perera, Notary Public and registered in the Colombo Land Registry.
AND WHEREAS the Donees herein are the lawful children of the Donors.
AND WHEREAS the Donors, out of natural love and affection, desire to gift the said property unto their children subject to reservation of joint life interest.

NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESS
That the said DONORS, in consideration of the natural love and affection which they bear towards their children:
(1) MISS. ANUSHA KARUNARATNE (NIC No. 900223344V)
(2) MR. NIMAL KARUNARATNE (NIC No. 920556677V)
(hereinafter collectively referred to as “the DONEES” which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include their heirs, executors, administrators and assigns)
DO HEREBY GIVE, GRANT, CONVEY AND TRANSFER unto the said Donees:
ALL THAT the property morefully described in the Schedule hereto
SUBJECT HOWEVER to the reservations and conditions hereinafter contained.

RESERVATION OF JOINT LIFE INTEREST

1. LIFE INTEREST OF BOTH SPOUSES
The Donors hereby expressly reserve unto themselves jointly and to the survivor of them:
The full and exclusive right to reside in and occupy the said property during their lifetimes.
The right to peaceful and uninterrupted enjoyment of the premises.
The right to exclude even the Donees from possession during their lifetime.

2. RIGHT TO COLLECT INCOME
If the property is rented or leased:
The Donors shall have full right to collect and retain all rental income during their joint lives and the life of the survivor.
The Donees shall have no claim to such income during the subsistence of the life interest.

3. SURVIVORSHIP
Upon the death of either spouse:
The entire life interest shall continue in favour of the surviving spouse.
The survivor shall retain full rights of residence and enjoyment until his or her death.

4. RESTRICTION ON DONEES
During the lifetime of the Donors and the survivor of them, the Donees shall not:
Sell, mortgage, lease or otherwise encumber the property.
Interfere with the Donors’ right of residence.
Demand partition or possession.

REMAINDER INTEREST TO CHILDREN

5. ABSOLUTE TITLE AFTER DEATH OF BOTH SPOUSES
Upon the death of both Donors:
The joint life interest shall cease and determine.
The Donees shall become absolutely entitled to the said property.
The property shall vest in equal undivided shares in the Donees unless otherwise agreed.

6. IRREVOCABILITY
This Gift is made voluntarily, without coercion and shall be irrevocable.

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD
The said property unto the Donees subject to the joint life interest reserved unto the Donors and the survivor of them as aforesaid.
